query:
SELECT 'orgNotes' as tbl, id, fileName, createdAt, uploadedBy FROM orgNotes WHERE organizationId = 990001
UNION ALL
SELECT 'intakeFile' as tbl, id, fileName, createdAt, uploadedBy FROM intakeFileAttachments WHERE organizationId = 990001
UNION ALL
SELECT 'taskFile' as tbl, id, fileName, createdAt, uploadedBy FROM fileAttachments WHERE organizationId = 990001
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT 'orgNotes' as tbl, id, fileName, createdAt, uploadedBy FROM orgNotes WHERE organizationId = 990001
UNION ALL
SELECT 'intakeFile' as tbl, id, fileName, createdAt, uploadedBy FROM intakeFileAttachments WHERE organizationId = 990001
UNION ALL
SELECT 'taskFile' as tbl, id, fileName, createdAt, uploadedBy FROM fileAttachments WHERE organizationId = 990001
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
